heading: Noting conditions of navigable channels
label: 666 Noting conditions of navigable channels
text: The said commission shall from time to time note the conditions of the navigable channels of said river systems, by cross-section surveys or otherwise, in order to ascertain the effect therein of such hydraulic mining operations as may be permitted by its orders and such as is caused by erosion, natural or otherwise.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsCalifornia Debris Commission abolished and functions transferred to Secretary of the Army by , , , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–662, title XI, § 1106100 Stat. 4229section 661 of this titleNov. 17, 1986
